document.source_title: IPL 2026 playoffs race: Who qualifies, who’s on the brink, and what each team needs

claims.claim_text: Gujarat Titans are effectively one foot in the playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: Five wins on the trot and effectively one foot in the playoffs.

claims.claim_text: Royal Challengers Bengaluru can seal a top-four finish by beating Punjab Kings.
claims.evidence_text: Beat Punjab Kings next and a top-four finish is virtually sealed.

claims.claim_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad must win both remaining matches to qualify.
Punjab Kings need help from others to qualify.
Chennai Super Kings can guarantee a top-four finish with 18 points.
claims.evidence_text: Win all three remaining matches and 18 points guarantees a top-four finish.

claims.claim_text: Rajasthan Royals need to win all three matches to have a chance.
claims.evidence_text: Need to win all three but even that may not be enough given their NRR.

claims.claim_text: Kolkata Knight Riders and Delhi Capitals have a narrow path to qualification.
claims.evidence_text: Negative NRR makes their path extremely narrow.

citations.title: IPL 2026 playoffs race: Who qualifies, who’s on the brink, and what each team needs

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet covering sports.
